LanguageData.StackTuner.Title: StackControl
LanguageData.StackTuner.Description: Configure item stack sizes with simple presets, a custom multiplier, or custom limits.
LanguageData.StackTuner.SingleStackHint: StackControl changes normal stackable items, body parts, implants and a small whitelist of safe special items. Weapons, armor, apparel, corpses and quality-based items are left untouched.
LanguageData.StackTuner.MultiplayerHint: Multiplayer note: All players should use the same mod version and the same settings.
LanguageData.StackTuner.PresetHint: Preset changes are saved and applied immediately. Custom multiplier and custom limit values are applied with the Save and apply button.
LanguageData.StackTuner.PresetValues: Small: x10. Medium: x50. Large: x100. Huge: x500. Custom multiplier - one multiplier for stack sizes. Custom limits - manual category limits.
LanguageData.StackTuner.CustomMultiplierHint: Custom multiplier mode multiplies vanilla stack sizes by one number. Press Save and apply after editing the multiplier.
LanguageData.StackTuner.CustomHint: Custom limits mode uses exact maximum stack sizes for each category. Press Save and apply after editing numbers.
